plugin.name: Combat_Manager
plugin.author: Combined by Claude
plugin.purpose: Manages vulnerability timers, round counting, and corpse handling
plugin.description:
Combined combat management plugin for ZombieMUD.
VULNERABILITY TRACKING: - Tracks all 9 vulnerability spell types - Auto-announces "Vuln Up" to party when cast - Auto-announces "Vuln Down" after 27 seconds - Vuln timer duration can be changed with vulntime [seconds] - Cancels timers automatically on creature death
ROUND COUNTER: - Tracks combat rounds from "NEW ROUND" messages - Displays total rounds when combat ends - Auto-resets on creature death
CORPSE HANDLING: - Multiple modes: tin, disc, drain, totem, collect, ranger, troll, archer, necro, barb, parcher, off - Automatic corpse processing on creature death - Totem mode with fallback to tinning if totem exists - Archer mode includes quiver storage for arrows/bolts - Parcher mode stores arrows in quivers 1-3 on 1-second delay (party archer) - Necro mode gives items to servant, preserves corpse, and scans frank condition - Ignores troll regeneration mobs (flesh pieces)
Commands: cmhelp - Show Combat Manager help cmstatus - Show corpse mode, round count, and vuln timers corpsemode - Show current corpse mode corpsemode list - Show corpse mode choices corpsemode [mode] - Set corpse handling mode vulnstatus - Show active vulnerability timers vulnclear - Clear active vulnerability timers vulntime - Show current vulnerability timer duration vulntime [seconds] - Set vulnerability timer duration rounds - Show current round count roundreset - Reset current round count cmquiet - Show quiet mode cmquiet on/off - Hide/show routine debug notes docorpse - Manually run current corpse mode
Vulnerability spells tracked: - Physical (afflictus corpus) - Fire (ardens amictus) - Cold (aufero fervens) - Electric (fulmen infractus) - Psionic (ignavus animus) - Asphyx (infirmus respiro) - Acid (macilentus corium) - Poison (macula valetudo) - Magic (magus foramen) - Ray of Enervation (spero candeo forem) - Acid, Poison, Phys, Psionic, Electric - Elemental Disarray (nequam victus confundo mentis) - Magic, Fire, Phys, Cold, Asphyx

trigger.match: You utter the magic words 'afflictus corpus'
You utter the magic words 'ardens amictus'
You utter the magic words 'aufero fervens'
You utter the magic words 'fulmen infractus'
You utter the magic words 'ignavus animus'
You utter the magic words 'infirmus respiro'
You utter the magic words 'macilentus corium'
You utter the magic words 'macula valetudo'
You utter the magic words 'magus foramen'
You trace the runes of weakness, exhaustion and instability in the air facing .+ and chant the magic words 'spero candeo forem'
You trace the runes of chaos, displacement and degeneration in the air facing .+ and chant the magic words 'nequam victus confundo mentis'
* tumbles and avoids your spell!
* completely resists the effects of your spell!

trigger.name: RoundStart
trigger.match: *NEW ROUND*

trigger.name: CombatDeathHandler
trigger.match: * is DEAD, R.I.P.

trigger.name: TotemExistsFallback
trigger.match: There already is a vile totem here!

trigger.name: ScanOutput
trigger.match: * is in *

trigger.name: ScanOutputNotGood
trigger.match: * is not in a good shape.

trigger.name: ScanOutputAlmostDead
trigger.match: * is almost DEAD.

trigger.name: ScanOutputSlightlyHurt
trigger.match: * is slightly hurt*

trigger.name: ScanOutputModeratelyHurt
trigger.match: * is moderately hurt*

muclient.script:
-- ==================== SHARED DATA ====================
-- Flesh pieces to ignore (troll regeneration mobs) - SHARED BY BOTH SYSTEMS local flesh_pieces = { ["Bit of flesh"] = true, ["Mass of flesh"] = true, ["Mound of flesh"] = true, ["Severed limb"] = true, ["Trollkin"] = true, ["Wall of flesh"] = true }
-- ==================== VULNERABILITY SYSTEM ====================
-- Mapping of spell words to vulnerability types local spell_to_vuln = { ["afflictus corpus"] = "Phys", ["ardens amictus"] = "Fire", ["aufero fervens"] = "Cold", ["fulmen infractus"] = "Electric", ["ignavus animus"] = "Psionic", ["infirmus respiro"] = "Asphyx", ["macilentus corium"] = "Acid", ["macula valetudo"] = "Poison", ["magus foramen"] = "Magic" }
-- Table to store active timer names active_timers = active_timers or {} timer_counter = timer_counter or 0 local DEFAULT_VULN_DURATION = 27 local MIN_VULN_DURATION = 5 local MAX_VULN_DURATION = 120
-- Track last attempted vuln so tumble handler knows which type failed pending_vuln_type = pending_vuln_type or nil pending_vuln_cancelled = pending_vuln_cancelled or false
local function clamp(value, low, high) value = tonumber(value) or low if value < low then return low end if value > high then return high end return value end
local function get_quiet_mode() return GetVariable("quiet_mode") == "1" end
local function routine_note(text) if not get_quiet_mode() then Note(text) end end
local function get_vuln_duration() local duration = tonumber(GetVariable("vuln_duration")) or DEFAULT_VULN_DURATION duration = clamp(duration, MIN_VULN_DURATION, MAX_VULN_DURATION) SetVariable("vuln_duration", tostring(duration)) return duration end
local function start_vuln_timer(vuln_type, party_message) CancelVulnTimers(vuln_type)
pending_vuln_type = vuln_type pending_vuln_cancelled = false
DoAfterSpecial(1, "if not pending_vuln_cancelled then Execute('party say " .. party_message .. "') end; pending_vuln_cancelled = false; pending_vuln_type = nil", sendto.script)
timer_counter = timer_counter + 1 local timer_name = "vuln_" .. vuln_type .. "_" .. timer_counter AddTimer(timer_name, 0, 0, get_vuln_duration(), "AnnounceVulnDown('" .. vuln_type .. "', '" .. timer_name .. "')", timer_flag.Enabled + timer_flag.OneShot, "") SetTimerOption(timer_name, "send_to", "12") if not active_timers[vuln_type] then active_timers[vuln_type] = {} end table.insert(active_timers[vuln_type], timer_name) routine_note("Started " .. vuln_type .. " vulnerability timer (" .. timer_name .. ")") end
function StartVuln(name, line, wildcards) local spell = string.match(line, "You utter the magic words '([^']+)'") if not spell then return end
local vuln_type = spell_to_vuln[spell] if not vuln_type then Note("Unknown vulnerability spell: " .. spell) return end
start_vuln_timer(vuln_type, vuln_type .. " Vuln Up") end
function StartRayOfEnervation(name, line, wildcards) start_vuln_timer("Enervation", "Ray of Enervation in(Acid, Poison, Phys, Psionic, Electric) vulns") end
function StartElementalDisarray(name, line, wildcards) start_vuln_timer("Disarray", "Elemental Disarray in(Magic, Fire, Phys, Cold, Asphyx) vulns") end
function AnnounceVulnDown(vuln_type, timer_name) Execute("party say " .. vuln_type .. " Vuln Down")
-- Remove this timer from active timers if active_timers[vuln_type] then for i, name in ipairs(active_timers[vuln_type]) do if name == timer_name then table.remove(active_timers[vuln_type], i) break end end end end
function CancelVulnTimers(vuln_type) if active_timers[vuln_type] then for _, timer_name in ipairs(active_timers[vuln_type]) do local result = DeleteTimer(timer_name) if result == error_code.eOK then routine_note("Cancelled timer: " .. timer_name) end end active_timers[vuln_type] = {} routine_note("Cancelled all " .. vuln_type .. " vulnerability timers") end end
function CancelAllVulnTimers() local count = 0 for vuln_type, timers in pairs(active_timers) do for _, timer_name in ipairs(timers) do local result = DeleteTimer(timer_name) if result == error_code.eOK then count = count + 1 end end active_timers[vuln_type] = {} end if count > 0 then routine_note("Cancelled " .. count .. " active vulnerability timer(s)") end end
function HandleVulnFailed(suffix) if not pending_vuln_type then return end
local vuln_type = pending_vuln_type pending_vuln_type = nil pending_vuln_cancelled = true
CancelVulnTimers(vuln_type) Execute("party say " .. vuln_type .. " vuln " .. suffix) end
function HandleVulnTumble(name, line, wildcards) HandleVulnFailed("tumbled!") end
function HandleVulnResist(name, line, wildcards) HandleVulnFailed("resisted!") end
-- ==================== ROUND COUNTER SYSTEM ====================
local round_counter = 0
function IncrementRound(name, line, wildcards) round_counter = round_counter + 1 end
-- ==================== CORPSE HANDLER SYSTEM ====================
-- Default mode local default_mode = "tin"
-- Flag to track if we're waiting for totem response waiting_for_totem = false
-- Flag to track if we're waiting for scan output waiting_for_scan = false
-- Valid corpse handling modes local valid_modes = { tin = true, mule = true, disc = true, drain = true, totem = true, collect = true, ranger = true, troll = true, archer = true, necro = true, barb = true, parcher = true, off = true }
-- Commands for each mode local mode_commands = { tin = { "put noeq in bag", "tin corpse", "get can", "eat can" }, mule = { "give noeq to kev", "tin corpse", "get can", "eat can" }, disc = { "put noeq in disc", "tin corpse" }, drain = { "put all shuriken in pack", "put noeq in bag", "sdrain corpse" }, totem = { "put noeq in bag", "use vile totem at corpse" }, collect = { "put noeq in bag", "get corpse", "put corpse in carriage" }, ranger = { "say eat all", "give noeq to kevin" }, troll = { "give all shuriken to kuolema", "give noeq to kevin", "get corpse" }, archer = { "put noeq in bag", "tin corpse", "get can", "eat can", "get all arrow from bag", "put all in quiver" -- Archer-specific: store arrows/bolts }, necro = { "give noeq to servant", "cast preservation at corpse" }, barb = { "put noeq in bag", "oscalp corpse", "use ancestral rite at corpse" }, parcher = { -- Commands executed with 1-second delay (handled specially in HandleCorpse) "get all arrow", "put all in quiver" }, off = {} -- No commands }
local mode_order = { "tin", "mule", "disc", "drain", "totem", "collect", "ranger", "troll", "archer", "necro", "barb", "parcher", "off" }
local mode_notes = { tin = "put loot in bag, tin corpse, eat can", mule = "give loot to Kev, tin corpse, eat can", disc = "put loot in disc, tin corpse", drain = "pack shuriken, put loot in bag, sdrain corpse", totem = "use vile totem; falls back to tin if a totem already exists", collect = "bag loot, get corpse, put corpse in carriage", ranger = "say eat all, give loot to Kevin", troll = "give shuriken/loot away, get corpse", archer = "tin corpse, eat can, move arrows into quiver", necro = "give loot to servant, preserve corpse, scan frank", barb = "bag loot, oscalp corpse, use ancestral rite", parcher = "delayed arrow pickup and quiver storage", off = "do nothing on corpse death" }
local function join_words(words) return table.concat(words, ", ") end
local function timer_count_for(vuln_type) local count = 0 for _, timer_name in ipairs(active_timers[vuln_type] or {}) do if GetTimerInfo(timer_name, 1) then count = count + 1 end end return count end
local function active_vuln_summary() local lines = {} for vuln_type, timers in pairs(active_timers) do local count = timer_count_for(vuln_type) if count > 0 then lines[#lines + 1] = vuln_type .. " (" .. count .. ")" end end table.sort(lines) return lines end
local function print_mode_commands(mode) local commands = mode_commands[mode] or {} if #commands == 0 then ColourNote("cyan", "", " Commands on death: none") return end
ColourNote("cyan", "", " Commands on death:") for _, cmd in ipairs(commands) do ColourNote("cyan", "", " - " .. cmd) end if mode == "totem" then ColourNote("cyan", "", " note: falls back to tinning if a totem already exists") elseif mode == "necro" then ColourNote("cyan", "", " note: scans frank and reports the result to party") elseif mode == "parcher" then ColourNote("cyan", "", " note: commands run after a short delay") end end
function ShowCombatHelp() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "Combat Manager help") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Status:") ColourNote("khaki", "", " cmstatus - show corpse mode, round count, and active vuln timers") ColourNote("khaki", "", " cmquiet - show quiet/debug note setting") ColourNote("khaki", "", " corpsemode - show current corpse handling mode") ColourNote("khaki", "", " corpsemode list - show all corpse mode choices") ColourNote("khaki", "", " vulnstatus - show active vulnerability timers") ColourNote("khaki", "", " vulntime - show vulnerability timer duration") ColourNote("khaki", "", " rounds - show current combat round count") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Actions:") ColourNote("khaki", "", " cmquiet on/off - hide/show routine debug notes") ColourNote("khaki", "", " corpsemode <mode> - change corpse handling") ColourNote("khaki", "", " docorpse - manually run the current corpse mode") ColourNote("khaki", "", " vulnclear - clear all active vulnerability timers") ColourNote("khaki", "", " vulntime <seconds>- set vulnerability timer duration") ColourNote("khaki", "", " roundreset - reset the round counter") ColourNote("yellow", "", "Tip: vulnerability timers are session-only and clear on death/reload.") print("") end
function ShowCorpseMode() local mode = GetCurrentMode() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "Combat Manager corpse mode") ColourNote("khaki", "", " Current mode: " .. mode) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Meaning: " .. (mode_notes[mode] or "(no description)")) print_mode_commands(mode) ColourNote("cyan", "", "Type 'corpsemode list' to see every mode.") print("") end
function ListCorpseModes() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "Combat Manager corpse modes") for _, mode in ipairs(mode_order) do ColourNote("khaki", "", " " .. mode .. " - " .. (mode_notes[mode] or "")) end print("") end
function ShowVulnStatus() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "Combat Manager vulnerability timers") ColourNote("khaki", "", " Duration: " .. get_vuln_duration() .. " seconds") local active = active_vuln_summary() if #active == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No active vulnerability timers.") else for _, text in ipairs(active) do ColourNote("khaki", "", " " .. text) end end if pending_vuln_type then ColourNote("cyan", "", " Pending cast check: " .. pending_vuln_type) end print("") end
function ClearVulnStatus() CancelAllVulnTimers() pending_vuln_type = nil pending_vuln_cancelled = false ColourNote("lime", "", "Combat Manager: vulnerability timers cleared.") end
function ShowRounds() ColourNote("lime", "", "Combat Manager: current round count is " .. round_counter .. ".") end
function ResetRounds() round_counter = 0 ColourNote("lime", "", "Combat Manager: round counter reset.") end
function SetQuietMode(name, line, wildcards) local setting = wildcards and wildcards[1] or nil if setting == "on" then SetVariable("quiet_mode", "1") elseif setting == "off" then SetVariable("quiet_mode", "0") end
ColourNote(get_quiet_mode() and "yellow" or "lime", "", "Combat Manager quiet mode is " .. (get_quiet_mode() and "ON" or "OFF") .. ".") if get_quiet_mode() then ColourNote("cyan", "", "Routine timer start/cancel notes will be hidden.") else ColourNote("cyan", "", "Routine timer start/cancel notes will be shown.") end end
function SetVulnDuration(name, line, wildcards) local wanted = tonumber(wildcards and wildcards[1]) if wanted then local duration = clamp(wanted, MIN_VULN_DURATION, MAX_VULN_DURATION) SetVariable("vuln_duration", tostring(duration)) if duration ~= wanted then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Combat Manager: vuln duration was clamped to " .. duration .. " seconds.") end end ColourNote("lime", "", "Combat Manager vuln timer duration: " .. get_vuln_duration() .. " seconds.") end
function DoCorpse() local mode = GetCurrentMode() if mode == "off" then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Combat Manager: corpse handling is off, so docorpse did nothing.") return end
ColourNote("cyan", "", "Combat Manager: manually running corpse mode '" .. mode .. "'.") HandleCorpse() end
function ShowCombatStatus() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "Combat Manager status") ColourNote("khaki", "", " Corpse mode: " .. GetCurrentMode()) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Quiet mode: " .. (get_quiet_mode() and "on" or "off")) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Vuln duration: " .. get_vuln_duration() .. " seconds") ColourNote("khaki", "", " Round count: " .. round_counter) local active = active_vuln_summary() ColourNote("khaki", "", " Active vuln timers: " .. (#active > 0 and join_words(active) or "none")) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Pending vuln cast: " .. (pending_vuln_type or "none")) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Waiting for totem fallback: " .. (waiting_for_totem and "yes" or "no")) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Waiting for necro scan: " .. (waiting_for_scan and "yes" or "no")) ColourNote("cyan", "", "Type 'cmhelp' for commands.") print("") end
function SetCorpseMode(name, line, wildcards) local mode = wildcards[1]:lower()
-- Trim whitespace mode = mode:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
if not valid_modes[mode] then ColourNote("red", "", "Invalid corpse mode: " .. mode) ColourNote("yellow", "", "Valid modes are: " .. join_words(mode_order)) ColourNote("cyan", "", "Current mode: " .. GetCurrentMode()) return end
SetVariable("corpse_mode", mode) ColourNote("yellow", "", "Corpse handling mode set to: " .. mode)
-- Show what commands will be executed if mode ~= "off" then print_mode_commands(mode) else ColourNote("cyan", "", "Corpse handling disabled") end end
function GetCurrentMode() local mode = GetVariable("corpse_mode") if not mode or not valid_modes[mode] then mode = default_mode SetVariable("corpse_mode", mode) end return mode end
function HandleCorpse() local mode = GetCurrentMode()
if mode == "off" then return end
local commands = mode_commands[mode] if not commands then Note("Error: Unknown corpse mode '" .. mode .. "'") return end
-- Set flag if we're using totem mode if mode == "totem" then waiting_for_totem = true -- Clear the flag after 2 seconds if we don't get the message DoAfterSpecial(2, "waiting_for_totem = false", sendto.script) end
-- Parcher mode uses a 1-second delay if mode == "parcher" then DoAfterSpecial(1, "ExecuteParcherCommands()", sendto.script) return end
-- Execute all commands immediately for _, cmd in ipairs(commands) do Send(cmd) end
-- If necro mode, scan frank after corpse handling if mode == "necro" then waiting_for_scan = true -- Clear the flag after 3 seconds if we don't get the scan output DoAfterSpecial(3, "waiting_for_scan = false", sendto.script) -- Send scan command after a short delay to allow corpse commands to execute DoAfterSpecial(0.5, "Send('scan frank')", sendto.script) end end
function ExecuteParcherCommands() -- Execute parcher commands (put arrows in quivers) Send("get all arrow") Send("put all in quiver") end
function FallbackToTin(name, line, wildcards) -- Only act if we were trying to place a totem if not waiting_for_totem then return end
waiting_for_totem = false
ColourNote("orange", "", "Totem already exists - falling back to tinning")
-- Execute tin commands immediately Send("tin corpse") Send("get can") Send("eat can") end
function HandleScanOutput(name, line, wildcards) -- Only act if we're waiting for scan output if not waiting_for_scan then return end
waiting_for_scan = false
-- Extract the full scan message from the line local scan_message = line
-- Send the scan result to party channel Execute("party say " .. scan_message) end
-- ==================== SHARED DEATH HANDLER ====================
function OnCreatureDeath(name, line, wildcards) -- Extract the mob name from the death message local mob_name = wildcards[1]
-- Ignore flesh pieces (troll regeneration mobs) if flesh_pieces[mob_name] then return end
-- ===== ROUND COUNTER LOGIC ===== if round_counter > 0 then Note("This combat was a total of " .. round_counter .. " rounds") end round_counter = 0 routine_note("Round counter reset to zero")
-- ===== VULNERABILITY TIMER LOGIC ===== -- Cancel all vulnerability timers on death CancelAllVulnTimers()
-- ===== CORPSE HANDLER LOGIC ===== -- Handle the corpse based on current mode HandleCorpse() end
-- ==================== PLUGIN EVENTS ====================
function OnPluginInstall() if IsPluginInstalled("94925710eda2ee22c3a5fd4a") and GetPluginVariable("94925710eda2ee22c3a5fd4a", "startup_mode") == "verbose" then ColourNote("green", "", "Combat Manager v1.3 loaded") ColourNote("cyan", "", " - Vulnerability timer tracking (9 types)") ColourNote("cyan", "", " - Round counter") ColourNote("cyan", "", " - Corpse handling (" .. GetCurrentMode() .. " mode)") ColourNote("yellow", "", "Use 'cmstatus' for status or 'cmhelp' for commands") end end
function OnPluginSaveState() SetVariable("vuln_duration", tostring(get_vuln_duration())) SetVariable("quiet_mode", get_quiet_mode() and "1" or "0") -- corpse_mode is saved inline by SetCorpseMode on every change -- round counter is saved inline by IncrementRound and reset inline by OnCreatureDeath -- vuln timers and runtime flags (active_timers, pending_vuln_type, etc.) are session-only state end
